title: ClarifyContextOutput
description: JSON payload emitted by `generacy cockpit clarify-context <issue>` (FR-009). Stable schema: every field is always present; missing data is null/empty rather than omitted.

issue.description: Echo of input issue ref in "owner/repo#n" form.

clarificationComment.description: Selected via AD-3: first comment created at-or-after the most recent `waiting-for:clarification` label event. Null if none.

spec.description: Contents of `specs/<branch>/spec.md`. Null if not found.

plan.description: Contents of `specs/<branch>/plan.md`. Null if not yet present (e.g., `/plan` has not run).

codeReferences.description: Touched files and open-PR summary for the in-flight branch. Null if not on a feature branch.

body.description: Comment markdown body as posted on GitHub.

author.description: GitHub login of the comment author.

path.description: Absolute filesystem path to the artifact.

touchedFiles.description: Files touched on the in-flight branch vs. the base branch.

prUrl.description: URL of the open PR for the branch, or null.

prDiffSummary.description: PR unified diff truncated to 4096 bytes with optional `…[truncated]` suffix. Null when no PR.
